name: sa-extension
description: Companion desktop extension for temporary Cowork testing.

tools.name: set_value
tools.description: Store a value in the extension

tools.name: get_all
tools.description: Return the configured extension values and the stored value

extension_public_value.title: Extension Public Value
extension_public_value.description: Non-secret test value exposed by the extension.

extension_secret_value.title: Extension Secret Value
extension_secret_value.description: Secret test value exposed by the extension.
